mapper.select: SELECT c.* FROM conversations c WHERE c.type = 'PRIVATE' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM conversation_members m1 WHERE m1.conversation_id = c.id AND m1.user_id = #{userId1}) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM conversation_members m2 WHERE m2.conversation_id = c.id AND m2.user_id = #{userId2}) LIMIT 1
